title: Put: A European put option has a strike price of 50...
summary: Analyze put option properties, pricing, or payoff structure.
prompt: A European put option has a strike price of $50 and a current stock price of $45. If the risk-free rate is 2% and volatility is 20%, what is the put option price?

options.text: Using the Black-Scholes-Merton formula, we can estimate the price of the

solution: Using the Black-Scholes-Merton formula, we can estimate the price of the European put option. The calculations yield a price of approximately $6.50.
